segments.text: The Lord told Moses,
Tell all the Israelites: You must be holy because I am holy; I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Show respect for your mother and father, and keep my Sabbaths. I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't turn to idols for help or make metal images of gods. I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: When you sacrifice a peace offering to the Lord, make sure you do it correctly so God will accept you.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: It needs to be eaten the day you sacrifice it, or the next day. Whatever is left over on the third day must be burned.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: If you do eat some of it on the third day, the sacrifice becomes repulsive and won't be accepted.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Anyone who eats it will bear responsibility for their guilt, for they have made unclean what is holy to the Lord. They must be expelled from their people.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: When you harvest the crops grown on your land, don't harvest right up to the edges of your field, or collect what has been missed.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Don't take every last grape from your vineyard or pick up the ones that have fallen. Leave them for the poor people and foreigners. I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't steal. Don't lie. Don't deceive each other.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Don't swear oaths in my name that are not true, otherwise you defame the character[^29] of your God. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't cheat others or rob them. Don't refuse to pay wages due to workers until the morning.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Don't speak badly about deaf people. Don't put objects in the way of blind people to trip them up. Instead show respect to your God. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't be a corrupt judge. Don't show favoritism to the poor or to the rich. Judge others fairly.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Don't go around spreading false rumors about people. Don't keep quiet when the lives of others are at risk. [^30] I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't hold onto hateful feelings towards others. Talk honestly with your neighbors, so that you don't sin because of them.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Don't look for revenge or hold a grudge against anybody, but love your neighbor as yourself. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Do what I tell you! Don't make different kinds of livestock breed together. Don't sow your fields with two different kinds of seed. Don't wear clothes made of two different kinds of material.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: If a man has sex with a servant girl promised to become another man's wife, but who hasn't yet been bought or set free, then compensation has to be paid. However, they are not to be killed, because she hadn't been set free.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But the man must bring a ram as his guilt offering to the Lord at the entrance of the Tent of Meeting.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The priest will set things right for him before the Lord using the ram of the guilt offering for the sin he has committed, and his sin will be forgiven.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: When you enter the land and plant any kind of fruit tree, treat the fruit at first as unclean. [^31] For three years you are forbidden to eat it.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The fourth year all the fruit must be dedicated to the Lord as a praise offering.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: However, the fifth year you may eat the fruit and in this way you will have an even greater harvest. I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't eat meat with blood in it. Don't use fortune-telling or witchcraft.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Don't cut your hair on the sides of your head or trim the sides of your beard, [^32]
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: don't cut your bodies in some pagan ritual for the dead, and don't get yourselves tattoos. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't bring shame on your daughter by making her a prostitute, otherwise the land will become morally and spiritually depraved.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Keep my Sabbaths and show respect for my sanctuary. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't try and find help from mediums or spiritists—don't even go looking for them, otherwise they will corrupt you. I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: St and up and be respectful of older people. Show reverence for your God. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't mistreat foreigners who live in your country.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Treat them in the same way as a fellow citizen, and love them as you love yourself, because you were once foreigners living in Egypt. I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't use dishonest weights and measures.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Make sure your scales and weights are accurate, that your measures of ephah and hin are correct. I am the Lord your God who led you out of Egypt.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Keep all my rules and regulations, and make sure you follow them. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD
